news.title: Police investigating after 62-year-old shot and killed
news.summary: An adult male was found dead at a home in DeKalb County late Tuesday night.

news.title: DeKalb police investigating after man shot dead in carport
news.summary: DeKalb County police officers are conducting a homicide investigation after finding a 62-year-old man shot to death Tuesday night in a carport outside his Lithonia home.

news.title: Atlanta police investigate morning shooting on Piedmont Road
news.summary: Gunfire erupted early Wednesday morning after an argument turned violent, leaving one man in the hospital with multiple gunshot wounds.

news.title: Argument between new roommates turns fatal in Paulding County
news.summary: Deputies arrested a new roommate following a fatal Paulding County stabbing in the Windmill Creek neighborhood Sunday evening.

news.title: Eight murder suspects among 10 inmates accused in Fulton County Jail shank attack
news.summary: The victim was on the phone when the June 1 attack began. Investigators said each of the 10 alleged attackers had a homemade knife.

news.title: Argument turns to gunfire leaving teen hurt in southwest Atlanta
news.summary: Atlanta police are investigating a shooting on University Avenue SW that left a 17-year-old girl injured Tuesday afternoon.

news.title: 17-year-old hurt in Atlanta shooting
news.summary: Police said their preliminary investigation indicates there was a fight that escalated to gunfire.

news.title: Deputies arrest blood-covered suspect after deadly stabbing on porch of Paulding County home
news.summary: When deputies arrived, they found a man standing on the back porch covered in blood and ordered him off the porch.
